stories.title: Open PR to trigger Molecule CI
acceptanceCriteria: PR exists on GitHub targeting main from ru3-molecule-ci-pipeline
gh pr list --head ru3-molecule-ci-pipeline returns one open PR
PR title references ru3 and molecule CI

stories.title: CI runs and result is captured
acceptanceCriteria: Molecule Tests workflow triggered on the PR head commit
CI result (green or red) is captured with run URL
If green: ru3 closed in beads with PR URL and run URL as evidence
If red: failure log saved to .omc/research/ru3-ci-failure.log and ru3 stays open
